meaning: n.[史]鞑靼地方(指中世纪时受蒙古人统治的自东欧至亚洲的广大地区)
examples: Objective to determine the content of total flavonoids from Tartary buckwheat.
The buckwheat has two cultivated species, Tartary buckwheat and common buckwheat.
On old maps, the land is called Outer Manchuria or, even more evocatively, Eastern Tartary.
